//: SPA fallback for client-side routing. This app uses react-router with real URLs (/login, /admin), but Vercel only has an index.html — there is no /login.html on disk. Without a rewrite, a DIRECT visit or a browser refresh on /login or /admin would hit Vercel's filesystem, miss, and 404. The rewrite below hands every non-asset path to /index.html so react-router can resolve the route in the browser.
//assets: The negative-lookahead source deliberately EXCLUDES real static assets so they are still served as files, never rewritten to HTML: anything under /assets (Vite's hashed JS/CSS bundles), and common top-level static files (favicon, robots.txt, sitemap, manifest, and any file with an extension). Only extensionless app routes fall through to the SPA fallback.
